key_dungeons.name: Tidal Caves
key_dungeons.description: Sea-smoothed tunnels wind into the cliffside. The sound of rushing water echoes from below. Wet footprints — not human — lead inward.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Enter the Tidal Caves and recover the Tidestone of Currents
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The fishermen say the caves only opened when the tide pulled back last month.

key_dungeons.name: Coral Crypts
key_dungeons.description: What was once an underwater burial ground now stands exposed to the air. Coral formations have fused with ancient sarcophagi. The dead here were not meant to be disturbed.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into the Coral Crypts and claim the Tidestone of Depths
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The shrine keeper says prayers for the dead have gone unanswered since the crypts surfaced.

key_dungeons.name: Drowned Temple
key_dungeons.description: A temple to a forgotten sea god rises from the muck. Its spires are crusted with centuries of shellfish. From inside comes a rhythmic chanting that no living throat could produce.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge the Drowned Temple of the Orc Shamans who have claimed it
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The orcs arrived days after the temple surfaced, drawn by whatever power still lingers within.

key_dungeons.name: The Abyssal Throne
key_dungeons.description: The palace of the Sunken Kingdom itself. Twisted spires of black stone claw at the sky. The air shimmers with residual magic. Whatever King Maren bargained with, its presence is strongest here.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the Abyssal Throne and seize the final Tidestone
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The elder of Tidewatch warns that none who entered the palace have returned. The reward must match the risk.

game_log: Sage Elara: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
Sage Elara: The Coral Crypts holds a powerful artifact. The shrine keeper says prayers for the dead have gone unanswered since the crypts surfaced.
Sage Elara: Will you seek it out and bring it back?
Sage Elara: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the Coral Crypts on your map. Be careful out there!
The barnacle-crusted hull of a merchant vessel lies half-buried in the sand. Seagulls perch on the broken mast. Whatever cargo it carried is long gone.

Found the Tidestone of Depths! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
A black stone pillar covered in barnacles. Carved deep into its face in an ancient script: 'TURN BACK. WHAT SLEEPS BELOW MUST NOT WAKE.' Someone has scratched underneath: 'Too late.'
The party defeated Orc War Host.
A massive stone figure rises from the mud, depicting a crowned figure with outstretched arms. Seaweed clings to its face like a beard. The inscription reads: 'King Maren III — He Who Listened.'
Sage Elara: You recovered the Tidestone of Depths! Here is 37 gold for your bravery!
Lady Revenna: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
Lady Revenna: The The Abyssal Throne holds a powerful artifact. The elder of Tidewatch warns that none who entered the palace have returned. The reward must match the risk.
Lady Revenna: Will you seek it out and bring it back?
Lady Revenna: No worries. Come back if you change your mind.
Brother Aldric: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
